mapper.sql: r.id, r.name, r.gender, r.age, r.education, r.workYears, r.phone, r.email, r.expectedSalary, r.positionId, r.departmentId, r.workExperience, r.educationExperience, r.skills, r.selfEvaluation, r.attachmentPath, r.status, r.createTime, r.updateTime, r.hrId, r.remark
mapper.select: SELECT , p.id as pid, p.name as pname, d.id as did, d.name as dname FROM resume r LEFT JOIN position p ON r.positionId = p.id LEFT JOIN department d ON r.departmentId = d.id WHERE r.id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

SELECT FROM resume r WHERE r.id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume (name, gender, age, education, workYears, phone, email, expectedSalary, positionId, departmentId, workExperience, educationExperience, skills, selfEvaluation, attachmentPath, status, hrId, remark) VALUES (#{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{education}, #{workYears}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{expectedSalary}, #{positionId}, #{departmentId}, #{workExperience}, #{educationExperience}, #{skills}, #{selfEvaluation}, #{attachmentPath}, #{status}, #{hrId}, #{remark})

INSERT INTO resume
name, gender, age, education, workYears, phone, email, expectedSalary, positionId, departmentId, workExperience, educationExperience, skills, selfEvaluation, attachmentPath, status, hrId, remark,
#{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{education}, #{workYears}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{expectedSalary}, #{positionId}, #{departmentId}, #{workExperience}, #{educationExperience}, #{skills}, #{selfEvaluation}, #{attachmentPath}, #{status}, #{hrId}, #{remark},
mapper.update: UPDATE resume SET status = #{status}, updateTime = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE resume SET name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, education = #{education}, workYears = #{workYears}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, expectedSalary = #{expectedSalary}, positionId = #{positionId}, departmentId = #{departmentId}, workExperience = #{workExperience}, educationExperience = #{educationExperience}, skills = #{skills}, selfEvaluation = #{selfEvaluation}, attachmentPath = #{attachmentPath}, status = #{status}, hrId = #{hrId}, remark = #{remark}, updateTime = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
